personality_one_liner: A high-contrast, OLED-friendly command center optimized for driver legibility on the move in Palermo's complex streets.

spacing.rule: Handle spacing correctly dont have extra spaces where its not required, handle padding and margin corectly and subtle for buttons and components

do's: Skip glass on this app. Dark-First Utility needs pure solid backgrounds for OLED clarity.
dont's: No blur on the bottom sheet. Use solid surfaceSecondary.

haptics.NO_TOLERANCE: always have switcher in settings or profile page
haptics.wiring: Haptic calls live inside these components (Button primary, TabBar item, SegmentedControl, FilterChip, switch, slider) they fire automatically on use. Dev agent does NOT wire haptics ad-hoc per screen.

chip_row.NO_TOLERANCE: Top filter / category chip rows are chrome, not content.

specs.behavior: Horizontal scroll only (no flexWrap, no flex: 1, no space-between). Sits outside the scrollable list as a sibling in the sticky header stack. Renders identically across Loading/Empty/Error/Loaded.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Google Authentication login screen with a dark, high-contrast hero background.

states.loading: Skeleton block over the login button. Reanimated shimmer.
states.error: Error toast with retry button for failed Auth.

screens.name: MainDashboard
screens.purpose: 70% live map and 30% sliding bottom sheet. Contains top chip row for vehicle size & ZTL pass toggle.

states.loading: Map area shows a grid skeleton; bottom sheet shows 3 skeleton delivery cards (same height, 3 lines of text) with static blocks.
states.empty: Map empty view. Bottom sheet shows an illustration (Palermo map) + 'No pending deliveries'.
states.error: Full screen overlay: 'Unable to load route data' + Retry.

screens.name: AddStopModal
screens.purpose: Manual address entry modal with autocomplete, and a prominent OCR camera scan simulation button.

states.loading: Skeleton lines for address autocomplete results.
states.empty: Form is clear, waiting for input or camera scan.
states.error: Inline text error below the input if address is not found.

empty_deliveries_illustration.alt: Aerial view of city street at night

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the '7 Dark-First Utility DARK' personality. High contrast, pure solid black/dark backgrounds for the OLED experience. No glassmorphism.
Implement Google Auth for the login flow. Use a dark, high-contrast hero image.

The Main Dashboard MUST render a sticky chip row AT THE TOP OF THE SCREEN (or top of the map container), outside any scroll view, for 'Vehicle Size (S/M/L)' and 'ZTL Pass Active (Toggle)'. Use fixed 56pt height, 36pt chip height.

Use react-native-maps for the 70% upper screen real estate. The Floating Action Button (FAB) for adding a stop MUST sit above the bottom sheet overlay (e.g. absolute positioning anchored above the sheet's rest height) and use 'brandPrimary' (#FF5A00).

Use @gorhom/bottom-sheet for the bottom 30% area. It must be draggable. The list items must clearly flag addresses inside Palermo's ZTL with an 'error' badge if the driver does not have a ZTL Pass selected in the chip row.

For the Add Stop form (use a Modal or nested Screen), include an 'OCR Scan Label' button. When tapped, mock a camera view (use the ocr_scan_mock image as background) and simulate extracting an address (e.g. 'Via Roma, 15, Palermo'). Auto-fill the address input after a short delay.
Add testIDs in kebab-case to all interactive elements (e.g., testID='ocr-scan-button', testID='add-stop-fab', testID='ztl-toggle').
Global Haptics toggler must be implemented. Wrap all expo-haptics calls in a util that respects the toggle state.
Skeleton loading states are REQUIRED for the delivery list. Never use just an ActivityIndicator when the content shape (list of deliveries) is known.
Ensure safe area is correctly applied. The chip row at the top should clear the notch, and the list content in the bottom sheet should clear the home indicator.
